message:
fix(extras): narrow-layout confirm dialog + translucent background compositing

ConfirmDialog now handles narrow layouts gracefully: when total button
width exceeds available area, only the currently selected button is
rendered (centered), preventing off-screen rendering.

Add apply_write_style() for cell-level style application that preserves
translucent backgrounds for correct compositing, separate from the
existing apply_style() which is for area-level fills. Switch draw_str()
to use apply_write_style() so translucent overlay backgrounds are
composited exactly once against destination cells.

Tests:
- draw_str_translucent_background_composites_once: verifies RGBA
  compositing correctness
- confirm_dialog_narrow_layout_keeps_selected_button_visible: verifies
  narrow-area button rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
